author: w3Lb
content: Delivered in commit a935531. rustup stable 1.95.0 -> 1.96.0 (rustc + clippy 0.1.96 confirmed, x86_64-pc-windows-msvc target carried over). cargo update: main workspace bumped zerocopy 0.8.51->0.8.52 (only change); fuzz workspace already current; cargo outdated --root-deps-only: all direct deps current. cargo fmt --all: zero diffs. cargo clippy --all-targets --workspace -D warnings on 1.96: clean, no new lints fired. cargo test --workspace: 23 suites green. Windows-target cargo check: passes on 1.96. MSRV left at 1.93 (floor, not ceiling — no reason to raise).
